unresolved_issues: Full private-sector AWM equations are not reproduced in the indexed paper and should be checked against Fagan-Henry-Mestre AWM documentation before review status improves.
The derivation is a compact first-pass source-backed summary, not a full equation-by-equation reproduction of EA_AWM05_rep.mod.
